description: After holding position, plant a banner that grants allies bonus armor and attack speed. The banner persists after you move or fall. Replanting requires a cooldown.
tooltipTemplate: After standing still for {stationaryThresholdSeconds:1}s, plant a banner ({bannerRadius} radius, lasts {bannerDurationSeconds:1}s) that grants nearby allies +{bannerArmorBonus} armor and +{bannerAttackSpeedBonus%} attack speed. Replant cooldown: {cooldownSeconds:1}s.
